document.title: CE Test Report for 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module

sourceSummary.oneLine: CE test report EQ740701-06 evaluates Laird Connectivity 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module models against EN 300 440 V2.1.1 (2017-03).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Evidence for CE radio compliance testing of the listed Laird Connectivity module models under EN 300 440 V2.1.1.
keyPoints: International Certification Corp. declares the tested sample was evaluated and in compliance with EN 300 440 V2.1.1 (2017-03).
Report version is Rev. 01, initial issue dated Oct. 02, 2019.
Model SU60-2230C was selected as representative for final testing and only its data was recorded.
Summary of test results reports Pass for EIRP, permitted operating frequency range, transmitter unwanted emissions, adjacent channel selectivity, receiver blocking, and receiver spurious radiation.
Measured maximum EIRP in the summary is 13.95 dBm against a 14 dBm limit for 5725 MHz to 5875 MHz non-specific short range devices.

evidence.claim: The document is a CE Test Report for an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.

evidence.claim: The report number is EQ740701-06 and the report version is Rev. 01.

evidence.claim: The initial issue date is Oct. 02, 2019.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No. Version Description Issued Date EQ740701-06 Rev. 01 Initial issue Oct. 02, 2019

evidence.claim: The applied standard is EN 300 440 V2.1.1 (2017-03).
evidence.evidenceText: According to the specifications of the manufacturer, the EUT must comply with the requirements of the following standards: EN 300 440 V2.1.1 (2017-03)

evidence.claim: International Certification Corp. declared the tested sample evaluated and compliant with the stated standard.
evidence.evidenceText: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: The product models listed for the EUT include ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, SU60-2230C, ST60-2230C-P, and SU60-2230C-P.
evidence.evidenceText: The following models are provided to this EUT. Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird Connectivity ST60-SIPT ... SU60-SIPT ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C ST60-2230C-P ... SU60-2230C-P

evidence.claim: Model SU60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model SU60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The EUT frequency range for the reported 802.11 modes is 5725-5850 MHz.
The EIRP test result was 13.95 dBm and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.2.2 Equivalent Isotropically Radiated Power 13.95 dBm Pass

evidence.claim: The EIRP limit for 5725 MHz to 5875 MHz is 25 mW (14 dBm) e.i.r.p. for non-specific short range devices.
evidence.evidenceText: 5 725 MHz to 5 875 MHz 25 mW (14dBm) e.i.r.p. Non-specific short range devices

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the source identifies a CE Test Report and EN 300 440 standard, but does not name a regulatory authority.
Possible OCR or source quality issue: one permitted-frequency table entry shows FH values of 8834.36 MHz while still marked Pass against a 5875 MHz limit.
Detailed spurious-emission measurement table values appear absent from several preprocessed pages, though summary pass results are present.
